task_frame_summary: The baseline route remains bounded and valid, but its coherence risks compressing unresolved disagreement into an overly smooth consensus story.
assumed_goal: Keep contradiction visible while testing whether the current frame closes too early around apparent agreement.
explicit_constraints: Keep contradiction and evidence gaps visible.
No truth or runtime shortcutting is allowed.
latent_frame_risks: A coherent review posture can feel more settled than the evidence warrants.
Thin signals may still be carrying too much certainty.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Which disagreement remains active despite the neat overall story?
What missing signal would materially change the confidence of the current frame?
frame_risk_signals: fast convergence around an incomplete evidence story
unresolved contradiction is described as mostly settled
